title: Sucat Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Sucat with a Z-Score of +3.97. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Sucat is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 67%, and the wind speed is approximately 14.3 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this critical event.
